help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: Everything you need to know about QR SYS

scanQr.title: Scanning the QR Code
scanQr.content: The guest journey begins by scanning the QR code placed securely inside their hotel room using any smartphone camera. No app download is required—they are instantly connected to the hotel's digital service portal.

browseMenu.title: Browsing the Menu
browseMenu.content: Guests can seamlessly swipe through an elegantly designed, multi-language digital menu. They can view crystal-clear images, read detailed descriptions of services, and check prices to decide what they want at their own pace.

placeOrder.title: Placing an Order
placeOrder.content: In just a few taps, guests can select their desired services, add them to the Service Tray, write any special instructions, and confirm their request directly from their mobile device.

trackStatus.title: Real-time Tracking
trackStatus.content: After placing an order, guests are provided with live updates. They can track the status of their request—whether it's 'New', 'In Progress', or 'Completed'—ensuring transparency and peace of mind.

tableTent.title: Table Tents
tableTent.content: Elegant acrylic table tents are perfectly sized to be placed on nightstands, dining tables, or desks within the room, making them highly visible and accessible to guests at all times.

wallDisplay.title: Wall Displays
wallDisplay.content: Sleek and permanent small wall mounts can be installed on the walls of suites or near the room entrance, offering a premium and integrated aesthetic.

doorSticker.title: Door Stickers
doorSticker.content: Minimalist, premium stickers are placed directly on the back of the room door, ensuring that it is one of the first things a guest sees when they enter.

managerRole.title: General Manager
managerRole.content: The highest authority in the system. The Manager registers the hotel, configures core settings (like timezone and currency), and adds primary Hotel Supervisors to oversee the daily operations.

hotelSupervisorRole.title: Hotel Supervisor
hotelSupervisorRole.content: Oversees the entire hotel operation. Responsible for creating main services (e.g., Housekeeping, Dining), configuring rooms, and assigning Service Supervisors to manage specific departments.

serviceSupervisorRole.title: Service Supervisor
serviceSupervisorRole.content: Manages a specific department. They add sub-services, create items/products, manage availability, and assign Service Employees to handle guest requests.

employeeRole.title: Service Employee
employeeRole.content: The frontline execution staff. Employees receive real-time notifications of guest requests, accept them, and update the status to 'Completed' once the service is delivered.

philosophy.title: System Concept & Goal
philosophy.content: QR SYS is a comprehensive hotel service management system designed to bridge the gap between guests and hotel staff. Our goal is to digitize the guest experience, allowing them to request services instantly via QR codes without needing to make phone calls or visit the reception. This increases operational efficiency, reduces wait times, and provides management with real-time analytics to improve service quality.

registration.title: Registration & Activation
registration.content: To get started, click on 'Register New Hotel' on the landing page. You will need to provide your hotel's basic information, including name, timezone, and currency. Ensure you provide a valid email address for the Primary Supervisor, as an activation link will be sent to verify your account. Once verified, you can access your dashboard and start configuring your services.

login.title: Signing In
login.content: Access your dashboard using your registered email/username and password. If you are an employee, your supervisor will provide your login credentials. Always ensure you are on the official login page before entering your details.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password?
forgotPassword.content: If you forget your password, click 'Forgot Password?' on the login page. Enter your registered email to receive a secure reset link. Note: Only Primary Supervisors can reset their passwords via email; other staff members should contact their supervisor for password resets.

orders.title: Managing Orders
orders.content: The Orders page is the heart of the system. Here, you see all incoming requests from guests. Orders move through three main statuses: 'New' (recently placed), 'In Progress' (accepted by staff), and 'Completed' (service delivered). You can also cancel orders with a specific reason if needed. Real-time notifications will alert you to every new order.

services.title: Main & Sub Services
services.content: Services are categorized into Main Services (e.g., Housekeeping, Dining) and Sub-Services (e.g., Room Cleaning, Towels). You can set working hours for each service, add descriptions, and upload images to make the guest menu more appealing.

items.title: Item Management
items.content: Items are the specific products or tasks within a service (e.g., 'Club Sandwich' under Dining). You can set prices, descriptions, and availability. If an item is out of stock, marking it as unavailable will instantly hide it from the guest menu.

rooms.title: Rooms & QR Codes
rooms.content: Each room in your hotel is assigned a unique QR code. You can add rooms, specify floors, and room types. Once a room is created, you can download or print its QR code to be placed in the physical room.

employees.title: Staff & Permissions
employees.content:
The Employees page allows you to manage your team. There are three main roles:
1. Hotel Supervisor: Full access to all settings and dashboard features.
2. Service Supervisor: Can manage specific services, items, and assigned employees.
3. Service Employee: Focused on receiving and executing orders for assigned services.

reports.title: Reports & Analytics
reports.content: Analyze your hotel's performance with detailed reports. Track total revenue, average completion times, and popular services. Reports can be filtered by date for management reviews.

settings.title: Settings & Localization
settings.content: In Hotel Settings, you can update your hotel logo, change the primary and secondary languages, and adjust timezone or currency. Changing your email requires a new verification process for security. If you change the secondary language, remember to update translations for your services and items to ensure guests see the correct information.

locationVerification.title: Guest Location Verification
locationVerification.content:
This feature requires guests to be physically present within a 500-meter radius of the hotel to browse services.

How to use:
1. From the Settings dashboard, enable the 'Location Verification' option.
2. Enter your hotel's Google Maps URL.

URL Note:
You can copy the long URL directly from your browser's address bar or use a short link (like maps.app.goo.gl). The system will automatically decode short links and extract the exact coordinates to ensure maximum accuracy.
